all.en: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to today's cybersecurity webinar.
all.zh: 各位早安，歡迎參加今日的網路安全線上研討會。

all.en: I am Daniel Park from the Information Security Operations team.
all.zh: 我是資訊安全營運團隊的 Daniel Park。

all.en: Over the next forty minutes we will focus on phishing emails.
all.zh: 接下來四十分鐘我們將聚焦於釣魚郵件議題。

all.en: Last quarter our company received more than nine thousand suspicious messages.
all.zh: 上一季公司收到超過九千封可疑訊息。

all.en: Roughly fifteen percent bypassed automated filters and reached employee inboxes.
all.zh: 約百分之十五繞過自動過濾器並送達員工信箱。

all.en: Three departments experienced credential theft incidents in the past sixty days.
all.zh: 過去六十天內已有三個部門發生帳密遭竊事件。

all.en: The recovery costs exceeded two hundred thousand dollars in lost productivity.
all.zh: 復原成本造成超過二十萬美元的生產力損失。

all.en: Human awareness remains our strongest defense against social engineering attacks.
all.zh: 人員警覺心仍是抵禦社交工程攻擊最強大的防線。

all.en: Today's session will help you spot warning signs before clicking links.
all.zh: 今日課程將協助您在點擊連結前辨識警示徵兆。

all.en: Phishing emails impersonate trusted senders to trick recipients into action.
all.zh: 釣魚郵件偽裝成可信寄件者，誘騙收件者採取行動。

all.en: Common targets include login credentials, financial data, and confidential documents.
all.zh: 常見目標包括登入憑證、財務資料及機密文件。

all.en: Attackers often disguise themselves as banks, vendors, or even your manager.
all.zh: 攻擊者經常偽裝成銀行、供應商，甚至您的主管。

all.en: Spear phishing targets specific individuals using personalized details.
all.zh: 魚叉式釣魚會利用個人化資訊鎖定特定人員。

all.en: Whaling attacks focus on executives and finance department staff.
all.zh: 鯨魚式攻擊針對的是高階主管與財務部門人員。

all.en: Let me walk you through five red flags to watch for.
all.zh: 讓我帶大家檢視五項應留意的警訊。

all.en: First, examine the sender's full email address, not just the display name.
all.zh: 第一，請檢查寄件者的完整電子郵件位址，而非僅看顯示名稱。

all.en: Attackers frequently use look-alike domains with subtle character substitutions.
all.zh: 攻擊者常使用字元細微替換的相似網域。

all.en: For example, replacing the letter o with a zero in a domain.
all.zh: 例如將網域中的字母 o 替換為數字零。

all.en: Second, beware of urgent or threatening language demanding immediate action.
all.zh: 第二，請警覺要求立即行動的緊急或威脅性語氣。

all.en: Messages claiming account suspension within hours are classic pressure tactics.
all.zh: 聲稱帳號將於數小時內遭停用的訊息是經典施壓手法。

all.en: Third, hover over links to preview the destination URL before clicking.
all.zh: 第三，請將滑鼠移至連結上預覽目的網址，再決定是否點擊。

all.en: Legitimate company links will always lead to our official domain.
all.zh: 合法的公司連結將永遠指向我們的官方網域。

all.en: Fourth, look for spelling errors or awkward grammar in the body.
all.zh: 第四，留意內文是否有拼字錯誤或語法不通順之處。

all.en: Professional organizations rarely send messages with multiple obvious mistakes.
all.zh: 專業機構鮮少發送含有多處明顯錯誤的訊息。

all.en: Fifth, question any unexpected attachments, especially zipped or macro-enabled files.
all.zh: 第五，質疑任何意料之外的附件，尤其是壓縮檔或啟用巨集的檔案。

all.en: Modern malware often hides inside Office documents disguised as invoices.
all.zh: 現代惡意程式經常藏在偽裝成發票的 Office 文件中。

all.en: Now let us discuss what to do when you spot a suspicious email.
all.zh: 現在讓我們討論發現可疑郵件時應採取的行動。

all.en: Do not reply, forward casually, or click any embedded buttons.
all.zh: 請勿回覆、隨意轉寄或點擊任何嵌入的按鈕。

all.en: Use the Report Phishing button located in the Outlook toolbar.
all.zh: 請使用 Outlook 工具列上的「回報釣魚」按鈕。

all.en: This action automatically forwards the email to our SOC for analysis.
all.zh: 此動作會自動將郵件轉交我們的資安監控中心分析。

all.en: The original message is then quarantined from your mailbox safely.
all.zh: 原始訊息隨後會從您的信箱中安全地隔離。

all.en: If the button is missing, email the security team directly.
all.zh: 若找不到該按鈕，請直接寄信給資安團隊。

all.en: Include the original message as an attachment to preserve headers.
all.zh: 請將原始訊息以附件形式附上以保留標頭資訊。

all.en: Never delete suspicious emails before reporting them to our analysts.
all.zh: 在向分析師回報前，切勿刪除可疑郵件。

all.en: Forensic information helps identify the full scope of any campaign.
all.zh: 鑑識資訊有助於辨識整個攻擊活動的範圍。

all.en: If you accidentally clicked a link, disconnect from the network immediately.
all.zh: 若您不慎點擊了連結，請立即中斷網路連線。

all.en: Then call the incident response hotline at extension 9111.
all.zh: 接著撥打事件應變專線分機 9111。

all.en: Our team will guide you through password resets and device scans.
all.zh: 我們的團隊將指導您完成密碼重設與裝置掃描。

all.en: Prompt reporting often prevents an isolated event from spreading widely.
all.zh: 及時回報通常可防止孤立事件擴散蔓延。

all.en: We track metrics including report rate and time to detection.
all.zh: 我們追蹤的指標包含回報率與偵測時間。

all.en: Departments with the highest reporting rates earn quarterly recognition awards.
all.zh: 回報率最高的部門可獲得季度表揚獎。

all.en: Simulated phishing tests will continue at random intervals each month.
all.zh: 模擬釣魚測試將於每月隨機時段持續進行。

all.en: Employees who fail must complete a short refresher module within ten days.
all.zh: 未通過測試的員工須於十日內完成簡短的複習單元。

all.en: Repeated failures may require an individual coaching session with managers.
all.zh: 屢次未通過者可能需與主管進行個別輔導。

all.en: Remember, the goal is not punishment but building safer habits.
all.zh: 請記得，目標並非懲罰，而是建立更安全的習慣。

all.en: Cybercriminals adapt their tactics constantly to bypass technical controls.
all.zh: 網路犯罪者不斷調整手法以繞過技術防護。

all.en: Recent campaigns use QR codes to redirect victims to fake login pages.
all.zh: 近期攻擊活動利用 QR 碼將受害者導向假登入頁面。

all.en: Others abuse legitimate cloud services to host malicious payloads.
all.zh: 其他則濫用合法雲端服務來託管惡意酬載。

all.en: Always verify unusual requests through a second communication channel.
all.zh: 對於不尋常的請求請務必透過第二溝通管道驗證。

all.en: Call your colleague directly rather than relying on email confirmation alone.
all.zh: 請直接致電同事，而非僅依賴電子郵件確認。

all.en: We will pause here for a brief question-and-answer segment.
all.zh: 我們將在此暫停，進行簡短的問答時段。

all.en: Please submit your questions through the chat panel on the right.
all.zh: 請透過右側聊天面板提交您的問題。

all.en: A recording of today's session will be posted by Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 今日課程錄影將於週五下午前發布。

all.en: Completion of the post-session quiz is required for compliance credit.
all.zh: 完成課後測驗為取得法遵學分的必要條件。

all.en: Thank you for your active engagement in protecting our company together.
all.zh: 感謝您積極參與，共同守護我們的公司。
